scripts.seed: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project . python -m seeds
scripts.seed:keywords: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project . python -m seeds.keywords
scripts.dev: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project . uvicorn main:app --app-dir src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload --reload-dir src
scripts.build: echo "Python service has no build step"
scripts.lint: uv run --project . ruff check src tests
